description_long: This is a sporty, low-cut athletic shoe featuring a deep navy blue synthetic upper with three white diagonal stripes outlined in orange on the outer side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The shoe has a bright orange padded interior lining and tongue, providing both comfort and a striking color contrast. The sole is a vibrant blue with a textured, studded pattern designed for enhanced grip, likely suitable for turf or artificial grass surfaces. The inner side of the shoe displays the word 'COPA' in white, further indicating its model. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with navy blue laces, and the overall construction appears robust and well-cushioned. The shoe is clean, with no visible signs of wear, scuffing, or dirt, suggesting it is in new condition.
description: A navy blue athletic shoe with orange lining, blue studded sole, and white Adidas stripes, designed for turf sports. The shoe is clean, well-cushioned, and features a bold color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, navy blue laces, and orange tongue lining.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three white Adidas stripes, orange interior, and blue textured sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue heel, orange lining, and the studded sole pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the 'COPA' text, orange interior, and the blue sole.
attribute_logo: Three white diagonal stripes outlined in orange on the outer side; 'COPA' text in white on the inner side.
